---
id: teleport-mobaxterm
title: Teleport with MobaXtrem
sidebar_position: 1
---
Connect Server Production  
GoTeleport with MobaXtrem

Akses berikut :  
[https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/#windows-tsh-and-tctl-clients-only](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/#windows-tsh-and-tctl-clients-only)

*   Teleport Community Edition

![](data:image/png;base64,)  

*   Open windows power shell on, follow this Command

![](data:image/png;base64,)

_Noted : cukup sampai command berikut, “Expand-Archive teleport-v$TELEPORT\_VERSION-windows-amd64-bin.zip”._

*   Open MobaXterm go to session menu

![](data:image/png;base64,)

\*noted : startup directory tempat instal dan menjalankan command pada power shell sebelumnya  
![](data:image/png;base64,)

*   Login with username and password teleport  
    _./tsh.exe --proxy=ark.3dolphinsocial.com --user=krisfian login_

![](data:image/png;base64,)

Finish now u can connect server with this session, and makesure always use ./tsh.exe for command in this session.  
  
example :  
./tsh.exe ssh dolphin@pi-prod-app-1 > _connect to server_

./tsh.exe ls./tsh.exe ls > _list server_
